history.content:
<thought>
I am at (7,4) facing north. The cell directly in front of me is lava (row6,col4), so I cannot move forward. To my right (east) is floor; to my left (west) is a wall. Therefore, I should turn clockwise to face east so I can move into the free cell. This will allow me to explore further to the right, as the rows above are blocked by lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor tile (.), which is safe. Moving forward will allow me to explore new areas and potentially find the goal. I have no other safe moves currently: left is lava, right is a wall, and backward is likely off the grid.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6,4) is floor. The cell to the left (west) is lava, and the cell to the right (east) is wall. The goal is not visible, so we need to explore. The only safe move is to go forward. Turning would not allow movement because the adjacent cells in those directions are impassable.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The only safe cell adjacent to the agent is directly forward (north), which is a floor cell (`.`). Turning clockwise would face a wall (`#`), and turning counter-clockwise would face lava (`L`), so neither turn allows a safe move. Therefore, moving forward is the only viable action to explore further and potentially find a path to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a floor ('.'), which is safe to step on. No goal is visible in the current observation, so I need to explore further. Moving forward will reveal new cells and potentially lead to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north, but the cell directly ahead is lava (L). The cell to my right (east) is a wall (#), and the cell to my left (west) is a floor (.). Turning counter-clockwise will make me face west, allowing me to move onto the safe floor cell at (7,3). Moving west seems the best immediate step to explore further.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, as the path ahead seems clear at least for the next few steps.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (up) is safe floor. I need to move forward along this column to eventually go right and up to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom row, fourth column, facing north. The cell directly ahead is floor (safe). I plan to move forward three steps to reach row 4, then turn right to go east, move two steps to reach column 6, then turn left to go north and reach the goal at (3,6). The first step is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead (row5, col3) is floor (.), so I can safely move forward. This will bring me closer to the goal located at (3,5).
</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>

<thought>
I am currently at position (7,4) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6,4) is a floor tile ('.'). The goal 'O' is located at (5,6), which is two steps north and two steps east from my current position. Moving north now is safe and will bring me closer to the goal. After this move, I will need to turn east to continue.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is to the northeast at (6,6). Directly north is floor but leads to a dead end surrounded by walls and lava. To the east, the cell (7,5) is floor and likely provides a path to the goal via (7,6) then north. Therefore, I should turn clockwise to face east and then proceed.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing upward. The cell directly ahead (row5, col3) is floor (safe). The goal 'O' is at (row4, col2), which is two steps ahead and one step left. I can move forward now to get closer, and later turn left to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom row, third column, facing up. The cell directly in front is a floor ('.'), which is safe. The goal is at (row5, col2), one step up and one step left. Moving forward first is a good step to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a wall (#). The goal 'O' is located immediately to the left of the agent. To move towards the goal, I need to face west. Turning counter-clockwise will achieve that.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly in front of me (north). Moving forward will place me on the goal cell, completing the mission.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
